target: Nadina Goodman (Herta Ingeborg Nadina Hofstatter Goodman)
scope_note: Defensive audit on behalf of her son. Findings list LEAK SOURCES, not leaked values, so the dossier itself does not amplify the exposure if it ever leaks.

anchor_sources: Bueler Mortuary obituary for husband Clifford James Goodman Jr. (names her as surviving spouse + maiden name + all six children including Matthias)
Radaris snippet (age 78, AZ locations, named relatives matching obituary)
ruled_out: Nadia Goodman of Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation

findings.claim: Subject's full birth name and maiden name are publicly published in her late husband's obituary.
findings.fraud_relevance: Maiden name is a common security-question answer.

findings.claim: Subject's home street address is published in her late husband's obituary on a publicly indexed funeral-home website.
findings.fraud_relevance: Enables mail scams, in-person elder-targeting visits, burglary/swatting planning. Unusual to be in an obituary; usually removable by family request.

findings.claim: Subject has a publicly indexed Radaris profile under 'Dina Goodman' showing age, multiple AZ addresses (Chandler, Show Low, Maricopa), and 7+ named relatives.
findings.fraud_relevance: Standard substrate for cold-call elder scams. Removable via opt-out (manual or managed service).

findings.claim: Subject is widowed since May 29, 2022; husband was Clifford James Goodman Jr., MD, FACOG, OB/GYN at MomDoc Phoenix-metro practice est. 1976.
Subject has six adult children publicly named in obituary: Clifford III, Peter, Nick, Matthias, Dana, Michael. 18 grandchildren (count only, not named).
findings.fraud_relevance: Complete grandparent-scam targeting kit (caller can plausibly impersonate any named child).

findings.claim: Subject is German-born and a German speaker.
findings.fraud_relevance: Vector for German-language scam callers; also a likely security-question category (place of birth).

findings.claim: Subject has a public Pinterest profile (pinterest.com/nadinagoodman) with hobby boards consistent with her demographic.
An Instagram account at instagram.com/nadinagoodman exists; content not visible from search snippet (likely private).
Daughter 'Dana Goodman' has at least two public Instagram accounts (@dana__goodman, @goodman.dana).
findings.fraud_relevance: Family-member social can leak schedule data ('mom is alone this weekend') exploitable for time-targeted calls.

findings.claim: Family local-prominence indicators are publicly documented: husband's father was first Chief of Staff at Chandler Regional Hospital; husband's grandfather was Mesa mayor 5 times; 40-year MD practice.
findings.fraud_relevance: Elevates target tier from generic to researched; cannot be unpublished.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: Likely lives alone or with limited cohabitants given widow-since-2022 + age 78 + 6 dispersed adult children.
hypotheses_not_facts.reason: Inference from public family structure; not directly stated.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: At least one of the six adult children probably manages or shares her phone/financial decisions; the requester (Matthias) is a candidate.
Show Low, AZ may be a second home / vacation property typical of Phoenix-area families.
hypotheses_not_facts.reason: Two-residence pattern in Radaris; common pattern locally.

hypotheses_not_facts.hypothesis: Pinterest activity pattern (Christmas/Crochet/Funny shirts) suggests low technical sophistication baseline — not derogatory, descriptive.
hypotheses_not_facts.reason: Inference from interests; relevant for tailoring opsec coaching.

opsec_recommendations_for_son.action: Contact Bueler Mortuary, request the home street address line be removed from the public obituary text.
Subscribe her to a managed broker-removal service (Optery, DeleteMe, Kanary, PrivacyDuck) for 12 months.
Set a family code-word for any urgent money request; share with all 6 children + 18 grandchildren via group text.
opsec_recommendations_for_son.note: Highest cost-to-impact ratio of anything on the list.

opsec_recommendations_for_son.action: Walk her through one real grandparent-scam transcript (FTC publishes them) so she recognizes the script.
opsec_recommendations_for_son.effort: 20 min in person or by phone

opsec_recommendations_for_son.action: Place a credit freeze at Equifax, Experian, TransUnion (free since 2018).
Audit her phone: enable carrier-level scam blocker; consider Google Voice as a public-facing number layer.
Sweep his own and siblings' social profiles for explicit family-relationship confirmations (Mom tags, family-event photos with her named) — these are what give scam scripts their authenticity weight.

deliberately_excluded_from_dossier: Literal home street address (in obituary; not duplicated here to keep dossier safe to share with privacy-removal services)
